title: Cheat Logger
description: A Server-Side mod that Logs admin commands to chat for all players.
body:
Cheat Logger is a lightweight server-side Fabric mod that improves transparency on Minecraft servers by logging administrative commands.

**Whenever an operator executes a command, every Player will see:**

👤 Who executed the Command  
⚡ Executed Command  
🖥️ If it was executed by Player or Console  

**This helps servers maintain fairness by making administrative actions visible to all players.**

<details>
<summary>✨ Features</summary>

Logs operator commands

Shows who executed the command

Displays console commands as [CONSOLE]

Blacklist system to hide commands like /msg or /tell

Server-side only – players do not need the mod installed

</details>

**⚙ Example log message** 

```
[CheatLog] Admin used: /give @p diamond 64  
```

**✅ Installation**  

Place the .jar file in the server's mods folder and start the server.

**💡 Because this is server-side, players joining the server do not need to install anything.**
